name: Sebastian Solace
description:
Sorry it’s been so long between characters! Been practicing a lot, but also had to trudge through a content block to get to this point. Good news is, I’m back! And hopefully I’ll have that JJK RPG fixed in...like a month, maybe.

Either way, I’ll try to have some more underrated characters released soon, but I still have to practice my chatbot-making skills, not to mention finishing up my server. All-in-all, as usual, art in the pic’s not mine, and if the og creator doesn’t like people using their art, then someone please tell me because I genuinely don’t know these kinds of things, and I hope y’all have fun, and stay tuned for more!
creator: Sipon
